title: Step 1: Top-level prompt clarification protocol
description: Add strict one-question-at-a-time clarification protocol, explicit phase gates, and completion gate to coordination/prompts/TOP_LEVEL_AGENT_PROMPT.md with contract checks.

title: Step 2: Coordinator iterative clarification contract
description: Rewrite coordination/COORDINATOR_INSTRUCTIONS.md to remove one-pass intake bias and require iterative clarification with specialist-informed follow-up questions.

title: Step 3: Task template lock metadata
description: Extend coordination/templates/TASK_TEMPLATE.md frontmatter with intended_write_targets, lock_scope, and lock_policy metadata.

title: Step 4: taskctl lock helpers and validation
description: Add lock-status/lock-clean-stale commands and intended_write_targets validation in scripts/taskctl.sh.

title: Step 5: Worker write-time lock enforcement
description: Integrate lock acquire/conflict/release behavior in scripts/agent_worker.sh execution flow.

title: Step 6: Stale-lock reaping and audit
description: Implement stale lock reaping restrictions and audit reporting in coordination reports flow.

title: Step 7: Contract/workflow tests
description: Add deterministic tests for clarification contract and locking flows.

title: Step 8: Docs and full workflow validation
description: Update coordination/README.md and CHANGELOG.md and run full orchestration smoke evidence.
